ddls:
CREATE TABLE "restaurants" (
  "restaurant_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each restaurant */,
  "restaurant_name" TEXT /* Name of the restaurant */,
  "sales_billion" REAL /* Sales figure in billions */,
  "main_food" TEXT /* Type of main food offered */,
  "is_open_all_day" INTEGER /* Indicator if the restaurant is open all day */,
  "has_kids_menu" INTEGER /* Indicator if the restaurant has a kids menu */,
  "year_founded" INTEGER /* Year the restaurant was founded */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the restaurant */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the restaurant */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the restaurant */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the restaurant is located */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the restaurant is located */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the restaurant is located */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("restaurant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "menu_items" (
  "item_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each menu item */,
  "restaurant_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the restaurant offering the item */,
  "item_name" TEXT /* Name of the menu item */,
  "item_category" TEXT /* Category of the item (e.g., sandwich, drink) */,
  "price" REAL /* Price of the menu item */,
  "is_kids_item" INTEGER /* Indicator if the menu item is part of the kids menu */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the menu item */,
  "calories" INTEGER /* Number of calories in the menu item */,
  "allergens" TEXT /* List of allergens present in the menu item */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_menu_items_restaurant_id FOREIGN KEY ("restaurant_id") REFERENCES restaurants ("restaurant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sales_records" (
  "sale_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sale record */,
  "restaurant_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the restaurant making the sale */,
  "sale_amount" REAL /* Total sale amount for the transaction */,
  "sale_date" TEXT /* Date of the sale */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Method of payment used for the sale (e.g., cash, credit card, mobile payment) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sale_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_records_restaurant_id FOREIGN KEY ("restaurant_id") REFERENCES restaurants ("restaurant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customer_feedback" (
  "feedback_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each feedback record */,
  "restaurant_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the restaurant receiving the feedback */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Identifier for the customer providing feedback */,
  "rating" REAL /* Rating given by the customer (scale 1-5) */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Comments from the customer about their experience */,
  "feedback_date" TEXT /* Date the feedback was provided */,
  "response_status" TEXT /* Status of the feedback (e.g., pending, responded, resolved) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feedback_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_customer_feedback_restaurant_id FOREIGN KEY ("restaurant_id") REFERENCES restaurants ("restaurant_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_customer_feedback_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., manager, staff) */,
  "restaurant_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the restaurant where the user works */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user (hashed for security) */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "loyalty_programs" (
  "program_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each loyalty program */,
  "restaurant_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the restaurant offering the program */,
  "program_name" TEXT /* Name of the loyalty program */,
  "reward_description" TEXT /* Description of rewards under the program */,
  "points_required" INTEGER /* Points required to redeem rewards */,
  "points_expiration" TEXT /* Date when points expire */,
  "program_status" TEXT /* Status of the program (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("program_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_loyalty_programs_restaurant_id FOREIGN KEY ("restaurant_id") REFERENCES restaurants ("restaurant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "operational_hours" (
  "hours_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for operational hours record */,
  "restaurant_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the restaurant */,
  "day_of_week" TEXT /* Day of the week */,
  "open_time" TEXT /* Opening time */,
  "close_time" TEXT /* Closing time */,
  "holiday_hours" TEXT /* Special holiday hours (e.g., Christmas, Thanksgiving) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("hours_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_operational_hours_restaurant_id FOREIGN KEY ("restaurant_id") REFERENCES restaurants ("restaurant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "promotions" (
  "promo_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each promotion */,
  "restaurant_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the restaurant running the promotion */,
  "promo_description" TEXT /* Description of the promotion */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the promotion */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the promotion */,
  "discount_percentage" REAL /* Percentage discount offered in the promotion */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("promo_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_promotions_restaurant_id FOREIGN KEY ("restaurant_id") REFERENCES restaurants ("restaurant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customer_purchases" (
  "purchase_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each purchase record */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the customer making the purchase */,
  "sale_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the sale record for the purchase */,
  "purchase_date" TEXT /* Date of the purchase */,
  "total_spend" REAL /* Total amount spent in the purchase */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("purchase_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_customer_purchases_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_customer_purchases_sale_id FOREIGN KEY ("sale_id") REFERENCES sales_records ("sale_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "loyalty_program_enrollments" (
  "enrollment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each enrollment record */,
  "program_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the loyalty program */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the customer enrolled */,
  "enrollment_date" TEXT /* Date of enrollment */,
  "points_balance" INTEGER /* Current points balance for the customer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("enrollment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_loyalty_program_enrollments_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_loyalty_program_enrollments_program_id FOREIGN KEY ("program_id") REFERENCES loyalty_programs ("program_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customer_rewards" (
  "reward_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each reward record */,
  "enrollment_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the enrollment record for the customer */,
  "reward_date" TEXT /* Date the reward was redeemed */,
  "reward_description" TEXT /* Description of the reward */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("reward_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_customer_rewards_enrollment_id FOREIGN KEY ("enrollment_id") REFERENCES loyalty_program_enrollments ("enrollment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "menu_item_sales" (
  "sale_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the sale record for the menu item */,
  "item_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the menu item sold */,
  "sale_date" TEXT /* Date the menu item was sold */,
  "quantity_sold" INTEGER /* Quantity of the menu item sold */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sale_id", "item_id")
)
